page_metadata.biotools__summary: A package for gene set analysis based on the variability of expressions. It implements DIfferential RAnk Conservation (DIRAC) and gene set Expression Variation Analysis (EVA) methods.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A package for gene set analysis based on the variability of expressions. It implements DIfferential RAnk Conservation (DIRAC) and gene set Expression Variation Analysis (EVA) methods.
